expectations.text: The controller sets Content-Type, Cache-Control, and X-Accel-Buffering headers
expectations.evidence: Found response.headers for Cache-Control and X-Accel-Buffering in stream_live (lines 78-79) and with_stream helper (lines 144-145).

expectations.text: One action implements the with_stream pattern using response.headers['rack.hijack'] and proc
expectations.evidence: Found response.headers['rack.hijack'] assigned to a proc on line 147.

expectations.text: One action includes ActionController::Live and writes to response.stream
expectations.evidence: Found include ActionController::Live on line 6 and stream.write (lines 88, 97, 101, 108, 113) writing to response.stream (assigned to stream on line 84).

expectations.text: Both endpoints handle IOError for client disconnect
expectations.evidence: Found rescue IOError in stream_hijack/with_stream block (line 55/line 151) and stream_live block (line 121).

expectations.text: Both endpoints close the stream in ensure blocks
expectations.evidence: Found stream.close in ensure blocks (line 69 and line 135).

expectations.text: The controller uses AgUiProtocol::Encoder::EventEncoder to encode events before writing to the streams
expectations.evidence: Found AgUiProtocol::Encoder::EventEncoder.new instantiated on lines 10 and 81, and encoder.encode(event) used on lines 17, 27, 32, 40, 46, 59, 88, 97, 101, 108, 113, 126.

expectations.text: The endpoints stream specific AG-UI events such as RunStartedEvent and RunFinishedEvent
expectations.evidence: Found RunStartedEvent.new streamed on lines 18 and 89, and RunFinishedEvent.new streamed on lines 47 and 114.
